headline: Robots beat human runners in Beijing race, signaling manufacturing push
summary: Investing.com -- The rapid evolution of China’s robotics industry was on full display in Beijing on Sunday, as a fleet of domestically produced humanoid robots demonstrated a significant leap in athleticism by outpacing professional human runners during a half-marathon event.

headline: Applied Materials Drawn Into Musk Terafab AI Chip Ambitions
summary: Elon Musk's team has approached Applied Materials to supply key semiconductor manufacturing tools for the new Terafab project. Terafab is planned as a vertically integrated AI chipmaking complex serving Tesla, SpaceX, and xAI, with involvement from Intel. The engagement positions Applied Materials as a core equipment partner for an emerging, multi company chip fabrication effort. Applied Materials, ticker NasdaqGS:AMAT, is being pulled directly into one of the most ambitious AI chip build...

headline: Tesla Will Report Q1 Earnings on April 22 — Bulls and Bears Clash Over TSLA Stock Targets
summary: Tesla (TSLA) will release its Q1 2026 earnings next week on April 22 after the market closes. The stock has gained 14.5% in the last five days and has crossed the $400 level. Meanwhile, Wall Street is deeply split on Tesla ahead of Q1 earnings, with price targets ranging from as low as $25 to as high as $600. The debate is on whether Tesla is just a car company under pressure or an AI-driven growth story with massive upside. The Q1 earnings on April 22 may not settle that debate, but they could

headline: Elon Musk Says 'More' Tesla Diners Are Coming After Hinting Where The Next Location Could Be
summary: Elon Musk said more Tesla Inc. Diners are coming, confirming an expansion of the retro-futuristic charging-and-food concept just days after he hinted that the next site could be in Palo Alto, California. Musk Signals Wider Diner Expansion Ahead On X, Musk reposted a clip from Tesla North America showing drivers ordering food from their cars while en route to the West Hollywood diner and wrote, "More Tesla Diners coming." More Tesla Diners coming https://t.co/bZwtFE8ape— Elon Musk (@elonmusk) Apr
